methodsAttempted.notes: Firecrawl search found official Graduate School notices on graduate thesis AIGC detection and AI-tool-use guidance, plus less specific news and training pages.

methodsAttempted.query: site:cug.edu.cn 中国地质大学 武汉 AIGC 本科 毕业论文 AI 使用规范 学术诚信
methodsAttempted.notes: Firecrawl search found an official Graduate School meeting news page confirming the school formulated a graduate thesis AI-use specification, but the page was event context rather than primary claim evidence.

methodsAttempted.query: site:bksy.cug.edu.cn 中国地质大学 本科 毕业论文 AIGC 检测
methodsAttempted.notes: Official Undergraduate School page was fetched directly after discovery; it contains substantive 2025 undergraduate thesis AIGC detection and academic-integrity requirements.

Verified graduate.cug.edu.cn and bksy.cug.edu.cn as institutional subdomains under the China University of Geosciences domain; robots.txt returned site 404 pages rather than disallow rules, so public pages were fetched with a clear crawler user agent.

artifacts.summary: Official-source discovery found three substantive public CUG sources: two Graduate School notices and one Undergraduate School notice. A Graduate School news item was recorded as rejected for event/news-only context and was not used as claim evidence.

stopConditions: Stop after official CUG Graduate School and Undergraduate School notices support thesis-scoped claims.
Do not infer a university-wide all-course AI policy from thesis, degree, or graduate-unit notices.
Do not use official news/event coverage, search snippets, training news, annual reports, or research showcases as claim evidence.
Do not stage raw HTML, raw PDFs, screenshots, or full normalized source text in Git.

artifacts.claimText: China University of Geosciences (Wuhan) requires graduate degree theses applying for degrees to undergo text-similarity and AIGC detection before blind review and before the post-defense degree evaluation subcommittee meeting, with strict implementation from the Fall 2025 semester onward.

citation.citationTitle: China University of Geosciences AI Policy Tracker record
citation.publisher: 中国地质大学（武汉）研究生院
citation.sourceRights: Tracker metadata is open licensed. Official source documents, page text, PDFs, and other source materials retain their original rights and terms.

artifacts.claimText: China University of Geosciences (Wuhan) Graduate School instructed graduate training units to organize supervisors and graduate students to study AI-tool-use guidance and, under that guidance and the school's trial graduate thesis AI-use specification, manage and review theses or practice outcomes and conduct AIGC detection.

citation.citationTitle: China University of Geosciences AI Policy Tracker record
citation.publisher: 中国地质大学（武汉）研究生院
citation.sourceRights: Tracker metadata is open licensed. Official source documents, page text, PDFs, and other source materials retain their original rights and terms.

artifacts.claimText: For 2025 full-time undergraduate thesis and design work, China University of Geosciences (Wuhan) conducts schoolwide plagiarism and AIGC detection, prohibits replacing student writing with AIGC, and states that high-risk AIGC detection prevents defense unless the student revises or provides an accepted explanation.

artifacts.sourceTitle: 关于研究生学位论文查重检测及AIGC检测的通知
artifacts.evidenceSnippetOriginal: 我校所有申请学位的研究生学位论文，均需在盲审前和答辩后各培养单位学位评定分委员会开会前进行学位论文的文字重合率检测和人工智能生成内容（以下简称“AIGC”）检测。2025年春季学期开始试行（已送审论文仅需在答辩后归档前检测即可），2025年秋季学期及其后将严格执行。
artifacts.evidenceSnippetDisplay: All graduate degree theses applying for degrees must undergo text-similarity and AIGC detection before blind review and before the post-defense degree evaluation subcommittee meeting; Fall 2025 onward is described as strict implementation.
artifacts.rightsNote: Tracker metadata is open licensed. Official source documents, page text, PDFs, and other source materials retain their original rights and terms.

citation.citationTitle: 关于研究生学位论文查重检测及AIGC检测的通知
citation.publisher: 中国地质大学（武汉）研究生院
citation.sourceRights: Tracker metadata is open licensed. Official source documents, page text, PDFs, and other source materials retain their original rights and terms.

artifacts.sourceTitle: 关于转发《规范研究生学位论文与实践成果中人工智能工具使用指南》的通知
artifacts.evidenceSnippetOriginal: 请各研究生培养单位认真组织导师及研究生开展专题学习，按照《指南》和学校文件《研究生学位论文AI 使用规范（试行）》（地大研发〔2025〕20 号）要求，切实做好人工智能工具使用的日常教育引导，做好学位论文（实践成果）的过程管理和审核把关，按学校要求做好学位论文（实践成果）AIGC检测工作，持续筑牢学术诚信底线，涵养良好学术风气，保障研究生培养质量。
artifacts.evidenceSnippetDisplay: Graduate training units are told to organize supervisors and graduate students to study the guidance and follow the guide plus the school's trial AI-use specification for education, process management, review, and AIGC detection.
artifacts.rightsNote: Tracker metadata is open licensed. Official source documents, page text, PDFs, and other source materials retain their original rights and terms.

citation.citationTitle: 关于转发《规范研究生学位论文与实践成果中人工智能工具使用指南》的通知
citation.publisher: 中国地质大学（武汉）研究生院
citation.sourceRights: Tracker metadata is open licensed. Official source documents, page text, PDFs, and other source materials retain their original rights and terms.

artifacts.sourceTitle: 关于做好本科毕业论文（设计）、查重检测及抽检相关工作的通知
artifacts.evidenceSnippetOriginal: 我校在全校范围内对2025届全日制本科毕业生的毕业论文（设计）开展查重和AIGC检测工作。学校禁止以AIGC（人工智能生成内容）替代学生撰写毕业论文（设计），系统将对是否通过AIGC撰写进行识别，并在检测报告中予以提示，AIGC检测为高风险不能进行答辩，需经指导教师指导修改，或写文字说明证明重复内容的合理性并由指导教师签字确认通过后进入答辩程序。
artifacts.evidenceSnippetDisplay: The Undergraduate School notice says 2025 full-time undergraduate theses/designs undergo plagiarism and AIGC detection; replacing student writing with AIGC is prohibited, and a high-risk AIGC result blocks defense unless remediated or explained with adviser sign-off.
artifacts.rightsNote: Tracker metadata is open licensed. Official source documents, page text, PDFs, and other source materials retain their original rights and terms.

artifacts.notes: Approved as a graduate-thesis-specific academic-integrity claim supported by an official Graduate School notice; not generalized to all courses or all university activity.
Approved as a graduate-unit instruction claim tied to the official notice forwarding guidance and the school's trial AI-use specification.
Approved as an undergraduate-thesis-specific academic-integrity claim supported by an official Undergraduate School notice; not generalized to all undergraduate coursework.

artifacts.title: China University of Geosciences staged AI policy evidence
artifacts.summary: Staged CUG evidence is limited to official thesis and degree-work sources: Graduate School notices on graduate thesis AI-use/AIGC detection and an Undergraduate School notice on 2025 undergraduate thesis AIGC detection. No university-wide all-course AI policy was identified in this run.
limitations: This tracker is not legal advice, not academic integrity advice, and not an official university statement unless a linked source is the university's own official page.

Claims are scoped to graduate degree theses, graduate thesis/practice outcome management, and 2025 undergraduate thesis/design work; this run did not find a public official university-wide all-course AI-use policy.
An official Graduate School news page was rejected as event/news-only context and was not used as evidence for operative claims.
artifacts.sourceRightsPolicy: Tracker metadata is open licensed. Official source documents, page text, PDFs, and other source materials retain their original rights and terms.
